value: v0.7.0 shipped Epic 30-B: per-channel audit projection to Slack threads. ChannelPolicy now has audit field ('off'|'compact'|'full'). Pre-execution receipts posted to originating thread. auditReceipts Map capped at 500 entries for memory safety. Self-echo regression tests locked in (PR #108). Closed issues #29 (policy engine), #30 (threaded action journal), #97 (user_id binding) — all shipped. Next: Epic 31 (bot-manifest protocol, 32 ready beads starting with ccsc-s53.4 P0 invariant).
